title: Source Tier and Claim-Level Governance Record

source_tiers.label: primary_canonical_or_official
source_tiers.use: May support direct rules only after text, edition, translation, context and scope are verified.

source_tiers.label: scholarly_or_peer_reviewed
source_tiers.use: May support methodology, interpretation, historical context, technical background or analytical framework.

source_tiers.label: expert_or_internal_study_discipline
source_tiers.use: May guide internal quality discipline or candidate methodology, but not public attribution or direct authority claim.

source_tiers.label: drishvara_editorial_synthesis
source_tiers.use: May be used for safe explanatory or reflective public text when source-backed claims are separated.

source_tiers.label: unsupported_or_unverified
source_tiers.use: Must not feed public module output.

blocked_sources: betting, odds or fantasy portals for sports facts
